race.comment: EXODAS (1) is a distance specialist who improved sharply on his sixth two starts back at Townsville with a win over 1300m at this track a week-and-a-half ago, getting home by 4.5 lengths after being in contention on the corner. Worth noting Aidan Holt goes aboard. Finds a suitable race and can get the job done again. LUCKY LASS (2) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Looms as the main danger. INNOVADER (3) resumed two-and-a-half weeks ago over 1200m at Rockhampton and was only beaten 2 lengths into sixth. Strips fitter and can feature in the finish. BETTY BOOM (7) best of the rest in a race with only a handful of chances.
